issue_summary: Split out use of child timers from RTimer to a sub-class
javadoc_before:
/** A recursive timer.
 * 
 * RTimers are started automatically when instantiated; subtimers are also
 * started automatically when created.
 *
 * @since solr 1.3
 *
 */
javadoc_after:
/** A simple timer.
 * 
 * RTimers are started automatically when instantiated.
 *
 * @since solr 1.3
 *
 */
